message:
Skip intermediate progress output in CI

The sync-changelog script uses clearLine/cursorTo for inline progress
updates, but these don't work in non-TTY environments. Each update was
printed on a new line, producing verbose output like 'reading releases
1/78' through '78/78'.

Now checks process.stdout.isTTY and only prints final summary lines
(e.g., 'platform: 78 releases') in CI while preserving live progress
updates in terminals.
